prompt:
Goal: Create an elegant anime-style luxury department-store cosmetics counter poster featuring NOZOMU as the advertising model for a new makeup collection, emphasizing a large luminous face, clear blue eyes, translucent skin, and a dreamy high-end beauty campaign mood rather than a magazine cover.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster, soft airy composition, pale white and ice-blue palette, glossy cosmetic-ad lighting, high-key exposure, lots of negative space on the left for typography, model occupying the right half and lower center.

Layout: Place the brand logo at upper left reading “LUNÉCLAIR” with smaller spaced text “BEAUTÉ” beneath it in refined gold serif lettering. Below it add small uppercase text “NEW MAKEUP COLLECTION,” then a large pale-blue serif campaign title split across two lines: PURE LUMIÈRE. Under the title include two short Japanese copy lines: “澄みわたる光を、わたしに。” and “透明感をまとう、私の輝き。” Near lower left add “Model” and the model name NOZOMU, plus a delicate cursive signature and small flower doodle.

Subject details: A beautiful young anime woman with silvery white long flowing hair swept to the right by a gentle breeze, large sparkling aqua blue eyes, soft blush, glossy lips, and porcelain translucent skin. She sits gracefully on a reflective cosmetic counter or display surface, turned slightly toward the viewer, one hand resting on the surface, one leg extending toward the lower right edge. Dress her in a sheer pale-blue and white ruffled slip dress with thin straps, translucent chiffon layers, floral accents along the bust and sleeves, and a light airy skirt. Add a large cluster of white and pale-blue flowers around one ear and smaller flower clusters near her shoulder, dress, and foreground.

Cosmetics and props: Show exactly 3 main cosmetic products in the lower-left foreground: 1 rose-pink lipstick in a white-and-gold tube, 1 open round compact powder case with a pale pressed powder and floral pattern on the lid, and 1 open rectangular eyeshadow palette containing exactly 6 pastel pans plus exactly 2 small applicators. Surround the products with small white and blue flowers and glossy reflections. In the softly blurred background, suggest a department-store cosmetics display with glass shelves, pale bottles, sparkling highlights, and cool daylight through tall windows.

Visual style: Delicate high-end shoujo/anime illustration, luxury cosmetics advertising, transparent watercolor-like softness mixed with polished digital rendering, luminous skin highlights, floating hair strands, soft bokeh, refined serif typography, pastel blue-white-gold color harmony, ethereal clean beauty aesthetic.

Constraints: Keep the image as a single polished storefront poster, not a magazine cover. Do not add extra people. Do not add more than the 3 main cosmetic products or change the 6-pan palette count. Keep all visible text elegant, minimal, and readable, with no watermark or clutter.
